2606.06044.title: IA-RAG: Interval-Algebra-Driven Temporal Reasoning for Dynamic Knowledge Retrieval
2606.06044.paper_summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has shown strong effectiveness in grounding Large Language Models (LLMs) with external knowledge. However, existing RAG and Graph RAG frameworks largely treat knowledge as static or associate time with coarse-grained timestamps or metadata, failing to capture rich temporal structures such as duration, overlap, and containment. We propose IA-RAG, a hierarchical temporal RAG framework that models knowledge as time intervals and performs retrieval under formal temporal constraints. IA-RAG represents facts as Interval Event Units (IEUs) and organizes them into a hierarchical Thematic Forest, where temporal dependencies are governed by Allen's Interval Algebra. To handle incomplete or uncertain temporal boundaries, IA-RAG further introduces a Sub-graph Time Tightening mechanism that refines fuzzy intervals through logical constraints within connected event subgraphs. In addition, IA-RAG supports implicit temporal semantic retrieval through interval-algebra-guided traversal. Experiments on multiple temporal question answering benchmarks, including TimeQA, TempReason, and ComplexTR, demonstrate that IA-RAG achieves strong temporal retrieval and reasoning performance, particularly on complex compositional temporal reasoning tasks. Our code is released at https://github.com/xiaoAugenstern/LogicalRAG_TemporalQA.
2606.06044.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）在將大型語言模型（LLMs）與外部知識結合方面顯示出強大的有效性。<lb/>然而，現有的 RAG 和圖形 RAG 框架大多將知識視為靜態，或將時間與粗略的時間戳或元數據相關聯，未能捕捉到持續時間、重疊和包含等豐富的時間結構。<lb/>我們提出了 IA-RAG，一種層次化的時間 RAG 框架，將知識建模為時間區間並在正式的時間約束下進行檢索。<lb/>IA-RAG 將事實表示為區間事件單元（IEUs），並將它們組織成一個層次化的主題樹，其中時間依賴關係由艾倫的區間代數所支配。<lb/>為了處理不完整或不確定的時間邊界，IA-RAG 進一步引入了一種子圖時間緊縮機制，通過連接事件子圖中的邏輯約束來細化模糊區間。<lb/>此外，IA-RAG 通過區間代數指導的遍歷支持隱式時間語義檢索。<lb/>在多個時間問題回答基準上進行的實驗，包括 TimeQA、TempReason 和 ComplexTR，證明 IA-RAG 在時間檢索和推理性能上表現出色，特別是在複雜的組合時間推理任務中。<lb/>我們的代碼已在 https://github.com/xiaoAugenstern/LogicalRAG_TemporalQA 上發布。
2606.06044.author: Xiaoman Wang et.al.
2606.06044.authors: Xiaoman Wang, Yaoze Zhang, Wenzhuo Fan, Hongwei Zhang, Ding Wang, Guohang Yan, Song Mao, Botian Shi, Yunshi Lan, Pinlong Cai
